title: Speculation 30 is unlikely to be released this year
display_title: Speculation 30 is unlikely to be released this year
wikitext:
[]: Speculation: 3.0 is unlikely to be released this year.             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:54 pm "Judging by Shunji Suzuki's tweets (ani director on the new movies), they are now in the middle of key animation (correction) work for Eva Q. Sadly, that means it's unlikely that Eva Q comes into (Japanese) theatres this year." via http://twitter.com/raito_kun So based animation director Suzuki's tweets on 3.0's production we should expect 3.0 to release sometime next year it seems. http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-369.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:57 pm Source other than somebody's twitter page, please? Is that page of somebody who's in the anime industry, or...?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:03 pm If this is true: Eva 1.0 took 1 year to make. (1 year from announcement to release) Eva 2.0 took 2 years to make. (From release of 1.0 to 2.0) Eva 3.0 takes 3 years to make? (From release of 2.0 to 3.0) I really hope 3.0 is the final entry because I can't wait four years for a proper climax. (2016)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:14 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: a proper climax. (2016)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:18 pm Wait, they're actually working on it? Say WHAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAT

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:18 pm They've been playing foosball in the studio while letting the interns work on it. Of course it's not going to be out this year. ._.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Source other than somebody's twitter page, please? Is that page of somebody who's in the anime industry, or...?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:44 pm Uh, that's not what I'm saying. The twitter page is to some fan in Austria. I want an actual source (Suzuki's own twitter page, for instance, which would be somewhat better).

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:44 pm Key word here is "unlikely", we might get a December release just in time for Super Robot Wars Z 2 Part 2.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:46 pm Shunji Suzuki is great and true GAINAX vet. Ganbare, Khara-tachikunsanchandono ^________^

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 08, 2011 4:08 pm I tweeted raito_kun, asking what Shunji Suzuki's twitter name was. Google was not helpful. I think this is speculation. But... well... THIS: http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2009-September/004918.html I AM DISAPPOINT

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Tue Feb 08, 2011 4:39 pm This is Suzuki's twitter http://twitter.com/moja_co

[]: Re: Speculation: 3.0 is unlikely to be released this year.             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:48 pm Nonoriri wrote: "Judging by Shunji Suzuki's tweets (ani director on the new movies), they are now in the middle of key animation (correction) work for Eva Q. Sadly, that means it's unlikely that Eva Q comes into (Japanese) theatres this year." via http://twitter.com/raito_kun So based animation director Suzuki's tweets on 3.0's production we should expect 3.0 to release sometime next year it seems.

[]: Re: Speculation: 3.0 is unlikely to be released this year.             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:58 pm Eva 04 wrote: Sadly,this shouldnt be taken seriously since it isnt an offical source. It's just some fan page and those are hardly ever reliable.

[]: Re: Speculation: 3.0 is unlikely to be released this year.             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 08, 2011 6:13 pm Xard wrote: shouldn't we take a look at Suzuki's own twitter before deciding that?

[]: Re: Speculation: 3.0 is unlikely to be released this year.             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Feb 08, 2011 7:05 pm Can we make it a bannable offense to start release rumor threads without proper citations? Ornette wrote: I put everything through google translate up to Feb 7th at some point and nothing seemed to be about Eva Q, but most of the tweets were gibberished by google so who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Feb 08, 2011 7:31 pm -

[]:             Quote Post by CORE » Thu Feb 10, 2011 2:04 pm I think a release this year is made more likely by the official statement. not by the interpretation by a fan however. I think there are still 2 films. The english voice cast think so as well.. in recent interview on Anime vice.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Feb 10, 2011 3:13 pm CORE wrote: I think there are still 2 films. The english voice cast think so as well.. in recent interview on Anime vice.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 10, 2011 3:26 pm Xard wrote: I don't think anyone has doubted two-remaining-films thing anyway
